decision: ICD validation pipeline — extract shared pattern, wire Photos, pilot LinkedIn+Facebook
name: ICD Validation Pipeline

steps.title: LinkedIn + Facebook ICD-first pilot — define mappings, validate existing data, extend harvest

history.event: Pipeline created from session. Steps 2 and 3 parallel after step 1.
Step 2 (#1515) completed. Photos validation gate wired — 8,017 thumbnailPath violations confirmed.

Step 3 (#1516) completed. ICD defined for Social & Professional domain (5 types). All schemas generated. SocialPost gate wired. Person/Recommendation/Position/Endorsement schemas ready, pending write paths + harvest. 50 tests pass.
